summary: Slack Web API is an HTTPS RPC-style API at slack.com/api for workspace automation such as posting messages, opening DMs, and listing conversations with OAuth-scoped bot or user tokens.

auth.instructions: Create a Slack app, request least-privilege scopes, install via OAuth, and send Authorization: Bearer <token> on API calls. For JSON write calls, set Content-Type: application/json and do not send tokens in query parameters.

endpoints.name: post-message
endpoints.description: Sends a message to a channel or DM. Requires chat:write.

endpoints.name: list-conversations
endpoints.description: Lists channel-like conversations visible to the token. Requires channels:read/groups:read/im:read/mpim:read based on requested types.

endpoints.name: open-direct-message
endpoints.description: Opens or resumes a DM/MPIM. Slack docs list required scopes as channels:manage, groups:write, im:write, mpim:write for bot tokens, or channels:write, groups:write, im:write, mpim:write for user tokens.

endpoints.name: lookup-user-by-email
endpoints.description: Finds a user by email address. Requires users:read.email.
